description: The date format select dropdown displays all available options and allows selecting any option from the scrollable list.
steps: Click the button with title 'Settings' (settings trigger button)
Wait for the heading 'Document Settings' to appear in the dialog
Click the 'Date Format' select dropdown to open it
Take screenshot showing the list of available date format options
Scroll down within the dropdown list to see additional options if present
Click on a date format option from the list (e.g., one that is different from the current selection)
Take screenshot to verify the selected date format option is now shown as the selected value
